news.t: Simplify Expands Barrier Income ETF Suite With the Launch of the Simplify Ancorato Target 25 Distribution ETF (XXV)

overview.description: The Simplify Ancorato Target 25 Distribution ETF (XXV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, seeking to provide high monthly income through a combination of interest incomeproducing US Treasuries and an income-generating options spread strategy. The fund aims, but does not guarantee, an annualized 25% distribution rate. XXV was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Expands Barrier Income ETF Suite With the Launch of the Simplify Ancorato Target 25 Distribution ETF (XXV)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management adds to barrier income ETF suite with XXV, which targets a distribution goal of 25% on an annualized basis.
